cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json,os,urllib.request,urllib.error
KEY=os.environ.get("N8N_API_KEY","")
BASE="https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1"
try:
    r=urllib.request.Request(BASE+"/workflows?limit=200",headers={"X-N8N-API-KEY":KEY})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(r,timeout=30) as x: data=json.loads(x.read().decode("utf-8","ignore"))
except Exception as e:
    print("ERR",str(e)[:80]); raise SystemExit
items=data.get("data",[])
print("WORKFLOWS", len(items))
for w in items:
    print(w.get("id"),"| active",str(w.get("active"))[:1],"|",w.get("name"))
PY
